race.comment: MY SHAREENA (9) closed hard but just missed over this distance at Kembla two back. Went to town last start and struggled in the concluding stages at the Kensington track in heavy going. Cherry ripe after three runs back and is more at home in a race like this. FREE AND FAST (2) returned from a 19-week spell with a tough all-the-way win over 1400m at this circuit a fortnight ago. Lightly raced three-year-old who won't mind the extra 200m and is capable of going to this next level. ROUSSILLON (3) comes here fourth-up after three modest efforts in the metro area since resuming. Best form measures up so maybe give him one more go in this company. COSTABIT (5) chimed in late but missed in the three-way thriller over 1500m at Hawkesbury recently. Drawn to enjoy a lovely run so cannot be underestimated. RED RAGS TO BULLS (11) has let backers down in town of late. Difficult alley to contend with but has the talent to test this field.
